name: Inside the Unfair Judge: A Mechanistic Interpretability Account of LLM-as-Judge Bias
summary: arXiv:2607.11871v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Existing studies of LLM-as-judge scoring bias work predominantly at the input-output level: they perturb inputs, measure score deltas, and propose...
description: arXiv:2607.11871v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Existing studies of LLM-as-judge scoring bias work predominantly at the input-output level: they perturb inputs, measure score deltas, and propose prompt-level mitigations. We argue that the same biases admit a representation-level account in the judge's hidden state, complementary to the input-output view and operationally useful in ways it doe...
author: Zixiang Xu, Sixian Li, Huaxing Liu, Xiang Wang, Shuai Li, Zirui Song, Xiuying Chen
